HEXAGHOST-DEVILS_DANCE_POWER.title: Devil's Dance
HEXAGHOST-DEVILS_DANCE_POWER.description: The first time you [gold]Advance[/gold] or Retract each turn, draw a card.
HEXAGHOST-DEVILS_DANCE_POWER.smartDescri: The first {Amount:plural:time|{Amount} times} you [gold]Advance[/gold] or [gold]Retract[/gold] each turn, draw a card.
HEXAGHOST-DOOMSDAY_POWER.title: Doomsday
HEXAGHOST-DOOMSDAY_POWER.description: The next time you [gold]Ignite[/gold] ALL Ghostflames, gain an additional turn.
HEXAGHOST-DOOMSDAY_POWER.smartDescriptio: The next time you [gold]Ignite[/gold] ALL Ghostflames, gain {Amount:plural:an additional turn|{Amount} additional turns}.
HEXAGHOST-DOOMS_ARRIVAL_POWER.title: Doom's Arrival
HEXAGHOST-DOOMS_ARRIVAL_POWER.descriptio: At the end of your turn, immediatly start another turn.
HEXAGHOST-DOOMS_ARRIVAL_POWER.smartDescr: At the end of your turn, immediatly start another {Amount:plural:turn|[blue]{Amount}[/blue] turns}.
HEXAGHOST-EXTRA_CRISPY_POWER.title: Extra Crispy
HEXAGHOST-EXTRA_CRISPY_POWER.description: Whenever [gold]Soulburn[/gold] detonates, the enemy loses HP and gains [gold]Soulburn[/gold].
HEXAGHOST-EXTRA_CRISPY_POWER.smartDescri: Whenever [gold]Soulburn[/gold] detonates, the enemy loses [blue]{Amount}[/blue] HP and gains [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Soulburn[/gold].
HEXAGHOST-GHOSTFLAME_BARRIER_POWER.title: Ghostflame Barrier
HEXAGHOST-GHOSTFLAME_BARRIER_POWER.descr: Whenever you are attacked this turn, apply [blue]X[/blue] [gold]Soulburn[/gold] back.
HEXAGHOST-GHOSTFLAME_BARRIER_POWER.smart: Whenever you are attacked this turn, apply {Amount} [gold]Soulburn[/gold] back.
HEXAGHOST-GIFTS_FROM_BEYOND_POWER.title: Gifts from Beyond
HEXAGHOST-GIFTS_FROM_BEYOND_POWER.descri: At the start of your turn, add a random [gold]Afterlife[/gold] card to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
HEXAGHOST-GIFTS_FROM_BEYOND_POWER.smartD: At the start of your turn, add {Amount:plural:a|{Amount}} random [gold]Afterlife[/gold] {Amount:plural:card|cards} to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
HEXAGHOST-HOT_STREAK_POWER.title: Hot Streak
HEXAGHOST-HOT_STREAK_POWER.description: At the end of your turn, apply [gold]Soulburn[/gold] to enemies that already have [gold]Soulburn[/gold].
HEXAGHOST-HOT_STREAK_POWER.smartDescript: At the end of your turn, apply [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Soulburn[/gold] to enemies that already have [gold]Soulburn[/gold].
HEXAGHOST-INTENSITY_POWER.title: Intensity
HEXAGHOST-INTO_SHADOW_POWER.title: Into Shadow
HEXAGHOST-INTO_SHADOW_POWER.description: Whenever you [gold]Retract[/gold], your next card is free to play and [gold]Exhausts.[/gold]
HEXAGHOST-INTO_SHADOW_POWER.smartDescrip: Whenever you [gold]Retract[/gold], your next {Amount:plural:card is|{Amount} cards are} free to play and [gold]Exhausts[/gold].
HEXAGHOST-LIVING_BOMB_POWER.title: Living Bomb
HEXAGHOST-LIVING_BOMB_POWER.description: The next time this creature's [gold]Soulburn[/gold] is detonated, it effects ALL enemies.
HEXAGHOST-LIVING_BOMB_POWER.smartDescrip: The next time this creature's [gold]Soulburn[/gold] is detonated, it effects ALL enemies.

HEXAGHOST-POLTERGEIST_POWER.title: Poltergeist

HEXAGHOST-POLTERGEIST_POWER.smartDescrip: Whenever you [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card, a random enemy loses [blue]{Amount}[/blue] HP.
HEXAGHOST-SOUL_BURN_POWER.title: Soulburn
HEXAGHOST-SOUL_BURN_POWER.description: In [blue]3[/blue] turns, this enemy loses HP, then [gold]Soulburn[/gold] is removed.

HEXAGHOST-TEMPORARY_INTENSITY_POWER.desc: Gain [gold]Intensity[/gold]. At the end of your turn, lose [gold]Intensity[/gold]
HEXAGHOST-TEMPORARY_INTENSITY_POWER.smar: Gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Intensity[/gold]. At the end of your turn, lose [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Intensity[/gold].
